name: ARIEL Nomad
description: A four-wheel drive vehicle developed for the British Army in the late 80s.

name: ARIEL Arrow
description: A single-seat sports car produced from the late 80s to early 90s.

name: ARIEL Centaur
description: A four-wheel drive vehicle used by the British Army for reconnaissance and command tasks.

name: ARIEL Atom
description: A lightweight road-legal track car first produced in the late 90s.

description: A four-wheel drive vehicle developed for the British Army in the early 2000s.

description: A high-performance version of the Atom powered by a Ford Duratec V8 engine.

name: ARIEL Nomad 3
description: A four-wheel drive vehicle developed for the British Army in the mid-2000s.

description: An evolution of the Atom featuring improved aerodynamics and performance.
